inclusions: Fluid-applied air barrier application to exterior sheathing
Air barrier membrane at above-grade walls
Transition membrane at window rough openings
Penetration sealing at conduits, pipes, and structural steel
Detail work at shelf angles and relieving angles
Lapping and sealing at sheathing joints
exclusions: Roofing membrane air barrier tie-in (by roofing trade)
coordination_notes: Air barrier installer must complete wall membrane before glazing trade installs window frames. Roofing trade is responsible for tying roof membrane air barrier to wall air barrier at roof_to_wall interface. Sequencing with masonry veneer installation must allow minimum 24-hour cure time for fluid-applied membrane.
notes: Scope covers ASTM E2357 air barrier system. Installer must be manufacturer-certified.
